hero_text.text: The only retractable flat ethernet cable engineered by IT professionals for the field. Deploy reliable wired connectivity anywhere — zero tangles, zero trip hazards, zero compromise.

data.heading_rts_text:
EXTNGO invented RTS. 
Rapid Tow Shearing.
data.composite_dual_description: For decades, field connectivity meant compromise. Tangled cables. Trip hazards. Unreliable drops. Limited reach. EXTNGO removes those constraints. A flat, retractable CAT6 cable that deploys in seconds, disappears underfoot, and delivers gigabit speed — anywhere you need it.

composite_dual_composites.title: ● EXTNGO Orange

✓ 1 Gbps full gigabit speed

description.text: Instantly add a reliable wired connection to modern thin-and-light laptops lacking built-in ethernet ports.
Connect Android phones and tablets to high-speed, secure wired networks in areas with poor Wi-Fi or for high bandwidth tasks.
Perfect for gaming setups and car-industry tablets that require stable, zero-latency wired Ethernet.
Deploy temporary ethernet drops rapidly during exhibitions and trade shows without taping down messy cables.
Universities and campuses needing temporary lab or classroom setups can deploy and retract networks in minutes.
Secure, reliable, zero-trip-hazard connectivity for hospitals, clinics, and modern conference rooms.
Ideal for Starlink / satellite internet users, campers, and RV owners who need long runs across rough terrain.
A robust tethering solution for robotics setups, ensuring uninterrupted data flow without tangling.
A godsend for music and stage production requiring rapid, temporary staging networks that won't trip performers.
Built tough for wind turbines and industrial environments where rugged, reliable networking is non-negotiable.
Never drop a frame again. Essential for gamers and streamers who need low-latency, non-dropping connections.
Productivity/power users and YouTubers who demand rock-solid internet while traveling or working remotely.

image_side_text.text: How we operate. We design fully integrated connectivity solutions for professionals who can't afford failure. Using proprietary flat-cable engineering and retractable mechanics, we control every detail — from material selection to final testing. From a roll of CAT6 wire through a finished, field-tested EXTNGO unit, including real-world validation by IT technicians, automotive engineers, and event crews.

advantage_description.text: We built the only retractable flat ethernet system in the world that delivers premium CAT6 performance, zero tangles, and industrial durability — at a size that fits in any laptop bag.
Our proprietary cable geometry, retraction mechanism, and color-coded identification work as one end-to-end platform.

advantage_items.title: Reliable connections
advantage_items.description: Flat design eliminates trip hazards and cable damage — the #1 cause of field connectivity failures.

advantage_items.title: Faster deployments
advantage_items.description: Retractable mechanism means setup and pack-down in seconds, not minutes. No coiling. No knots. No wasted time.

advantage_items.title: Portable by design
advantage_items.description: Compact 6.5" × 5.1" × 3" housing fits anywhere. Carry 50ft of cable like it's nothing.

data.accordion_title: Our customers have no margin for error.
data.accordion_section_title: Trusted by professionals who can't afford a dropped connection

accordion_items.text: "Where was this product 20 years ago when I was dragging CAT5 cables all over the floor to set up a temporary LAN?"

"I use the small one to connect my laptop to the port on the long cable which is stretched out to connect to our music system. It works perfectly and makes my work so much easier. I especially love the flat cable!"
"As a technician, I'm always looking for a cable that is slightly longer than I have. Now I have my CAT6 at the ready, without a huge knot of cable in my work van."

data.video_name: Technician using EXTNGO on the go
data.business_title: We don't just sell cables. We unlock reliable connectivity.

business_description.text: EXTNGO eliminates compromise in temporary network setups.
We provide a purpose-built connectivity solution — from flat-cable engineering to retractable mechanics to real-world validation.
Our integrated system unites materials science, mechanical design, and field testing into one reliable product.
It is tailored to the needs of each user. Available direct via Amazon for individuals, or via bulk/B2B channels for teams and enterprises.

business_list_items.title: No guesswork.
business_list_items.description: Color-coded lengths, clear specs, proven performance. You know exactly what you're getting.

business_list_items.title: Fully validated.
business_list_items.description: Tested by IT professionals, automotive techs, event crews, and remote workers. Real reviews, real results.

business_list_items.title: Scalable from day one.
business_list_items.description: Buy one for your kit. Order fifty for your team. Same premium quality, same reliable performance.

business_comparison_left.text: No field support or warranty clarity

business_comparison_right.text: Every unit tested to CAT6 spec

data.carousel_title: Supporting leading professionals: IT Field Services, Live Events, Diagnostics, Remote Ops.
data.building_heading: We're not just improving cables. We're expanding what professionals can do in the field.

building_description.text: By removing the constraints of traditional ethernet — tangles, trip hazards, fragile connectors, unreliable drops — we unlock a new standard for temporary connectivity: one that's lighter, faster, more reliable, and radically more efficient.
EXTNGO enables the connectivity foundation for the next era of mobile work, remote diagnostics, live events, and always-on performance.

data.building_cta: Deploy a reliable wired network anywhere, instantly.

feature_cards.title: Retractable flat cable
feature_cards.description: The only ethernet cable that deploys flat, retracts tangle-free, and disappears underfoot — unlocking setups no generic cable can handle.

feature_cards.title: Lighter workflow
feature_cards.description: Eliminate cable clutter, trip hazards, and setup time. Work cleaner, faster, safer.

feature_cards.title: Zero dropouts
feature_cards.description: Industrial-grade flat cable + gold-plated RJ45 connectors = rock-solid 1Gbps performance, every time.

feature_cards.title: Faster deployments
feature_cards.description: Retract and deploy in seconds. No coiling. No knots. No wasted time.

feature_cards.title: Integrated partner
feature_cards.description: From product design to Amazon fulfillment to B2B support — one partner, one standard, one reliable connection.

data.meta_description: EXTNGO: Professional retractable flat ethernet cables for IT field services, live events, and automotive diagnostics. Deploy reliable CAT6 connectivity anywhere in seconds — zero tangles, zero trip hazards.
